source.body_text_sample:
Golf With Us
News & Promos
About Us
Contact Us
Book A Tee Time
Job Opportunities

GOLFOMAX is Ottawa’s Premier Indoor Golf Club, established in 1995. We pride ourselves on offering customers the best golf simulator technology and customer service, including food and beverages.

If you or someone you know would like to work in a fun social environment among avid golfers, send your resume with a minimum of two references to info@golfomax.com

We are a seasonal business, looking for employees to work from October through April.

We are open 7 days a week from 7:00am to as late as 2:00am.

Shifts: We are looking for candidates who are available to work from 2 to 5 shifts per week. Generally, shifts run eight hours. Sometimes we may need four-hour shifts.

DUTIES:

– Setting up customers on the golf simulators, providing orientation as needed.

– Tee time reservations / managing tee sheet schedule / confirmations.

– Food & Beverage service: Taking / processing orders, kitchen work, bar service.

– Cashing out customers using POS system.

– General daily maintenance.

– Night shift closing duties

QUALIFICATIONS:

Candidates with golf club employment and playing experience preferred.

Restaurant food & beverage experience and “Smart Serve” certification.

Copyright © 2003-2026  GOLFOMAX,  All Rights Reserved.     Meticulously crafted by:  Thainks!
